issues.title: fix redirect for order and become chef button
Display Upcoming Notifications in UI
issues.body:
Description: Show users a preview of upcoming reminders in the dashboard or tracker page.

Tasks:

- [x] Create a “Reminders” section in the homepage or tracker

- [ ] List assignments due in next 3 days with icons

- [ ] Show a badge or toast if a reminder was just sent

issues.title: Add User Preference for Email Notifications
issues.body:
Description: Allow users to opt in/out of email reminders from their profile settings.

Tasks:

- [ ] Add emailNotifications: true/false to User schema

- [ ] Update profile UI to toggle this setting

- [ ] Respect this flag in the cron job logic

issues.title: Track Notification History per Assignment
issues.body:
Description: Store metadata about which notifications have been sent to avoid duplicates.

Tasks:

- [ ] Add notifications: [{ type: String, sentAt: Date }] to Assignment schema

- [ ] Update this array after each successful email

- [ ] Prevent re-sending the same type (e.g. “1-day reminder”) twice

issues.title: Integrate Nodemailer for Sending Emails
issues.body:
Description: Set up email delivery using Nodemailer and a test SMTP service (like Mailtrap or Gmail).

Tasks:

- [ ] Configure nodemailer with SMTP credentials

- [ ] Create reusable sendEmail(to, subject, html) utility

- [ ] Test sending a sample reminder email

issues.title: Create Email Notification Template
issues.body:
Description: Design a clean and informative email layout for assignment reminders.

Tasks:

- [ ] Use nodemailer with HTML template (or MJML for responsive design)

- [ ] Include assignment title, deadline, and link to open in app

- [ ] Add subject line like “⏰ Upcoming Assignment Due Soon!”

issues.title: Setup Cron Job to Trigger Notifications
issues.body:
Description: Run a scheduled task daily to check for upcoming deadlines and trigger email alerts.

Tasks:

- [ ] Use node-cron or Agenda.js to run a job every 24 hours

- [ ] Fetch all users and their upcoming assignments

- [ ] Call email service for each user with pending deadlines

issues.title: Design Notification Logic Based on Deadlines
issues.body:
Description: Create logic to determine when users should be notified about upcoming or missed assignments.

Tasks:

- [ ] Define notification rules (e.g. 3 days before, 1 day before, on deadline)

- [ ] Filter assignments with status !== 'completed' and deadline within next 72 hours

- [ ] Tag each assignment with notificationSent: true/false to prevent duplicates

issues.body:

issues.title: Show Synced Events with Google Calendar Icon
issues.body:
Description: Visually show which assignments are already synced with Google Calendar.

Tasks:

- [ ] Use an icon (like Google Calendar logo or ✅) next to synced events

- [ ] Conditionally show “Synced” vs “Add to Calendar” based on stored status

- [ ] Tooltip on icon: “Synced with Google Calendar"

issues.title: Design & Store Event Format for Calendar View
issues.body:
Description: Ensure each assignment object has clean calendar-compatible fields.

Tasks:

- [ ] Normalize all deadlines to ISO strings (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MMZ)

- [ ] Add a calendarEventId field (for sync and deduplication)

- [ ] Include optional reminderTime and color fields per event

issues.title: Enable Add-to-Google-Calendar Functionality
issues.body:
Description: Let users add assignments to their personal Google Calendar with one click.

Tasks:

- [ ] Use Google Calendar API to request OAuth permissions (calendar.events.write)

- [ ] Create a button like “Add to Google Calendar” in the event modal/card

- [ ] Send POST request to Google Calendar API with event payload

- [ ] Store calendar integration flag per user

issues.title: Add Event Click and Hover Popovers
issues.body:
Description: Enhance the calendar UI with interactive event tooltips or modals.

Tasks:

- [ ] Show assignment title + due time on hover

- [ ] Open modal with full details on click (description, status, edit option)

- [ ] Animate modal with framer-motion or @radix-ui/dialog

issues.title: Build Custom Calendar UI on Homepage
issues.body:

Tasks:

- [ ] Use a calendar library like react-big-calendar or @fullcalendar/react

- [ ] Connect it to local assignment data (assignments[])

- [ ] Style it with TailwindCSS to match theme

- [ ] Highlight today’s date and upcoming deadlines

issues.title: Create Assignment Sync Placeholder Service
issues.body:

Tasks:

- [ ] Create a services/newtonSync.js script

- [ ] Simulate fetching assignments from external API and populate DB

- [ ] Add a source: 'Newton' tag on mocked data

issues.title: Design Notification Card UI Component
issues.body:
Description: Create a UI element to display smart reminders like "Assignment due tomorrow".

Tasks:

[ ] Create card or toast style component (bg-yellow-50, text-warning)

[ ] Render on homepage or tracker page top

[ ] Allow dismissing or “mark as done” actions

issues.title: Setup Cron Job for Upcoming Assignment Checks
issues.body:
Description: Prepare cron logic to run daily and check if any assignment is due within 24–72 hours.

Tasks:

- [ ] Use node-cron or setInterval to check daily

- [ ] Fetch assignments for all users where status !== 'completed'

- [ ] For now, just console.log() soonest assignment per user

issues.title: Integrate Add Assignment Modal/Form
issues.body:
Description: Create a form for users to manually add their own assignments while Newton School sync is pending.

Tasks:

- [ ] Create modal or route with input fields for title, deadline, optional description

- [ ] Post data to POST /assignments

- [ ] Validate inputs and give toast on success/failure

issues.title: Design Tracker UI with Filter Options
issues.body:
Description: Build a frontend tracker component with views like “Upcoming”, “Missed”, and “Completed”.

Tasks:

- [ ] Build responsive layout with cards or list view using TailwindCSS

- [ ] Add tabs or dropdown to filter by deadline/status

- [ ] Display color-coded deadlines (e.g. red for missed)

issues.title: Create Endpoints for Assignment Tracker
issues.body:
Description: Set up REST APIs to create, fetch, update, and delete assignment records.

Tasks:

- [ ] POST /assignments to manually add an assignment

- [ ] GET /assignments to fetch all assignments for a user

- [ ] PATCH /assignments/:id to update status or edit details

- [ ] DELETE /assignments/:id to remove an entry

issues.title: Scaffold Assignment Tracker Schema (Backend)
issues.body:
Description: Create Mongoose models for storing assignment metadata like title, due date, and completion status.

Tasks:

- [ ] Define Assignment model with fields: title, description, deadline, status, source, user

- [ ] Add indexing on deadline for efficient querying

- [ ] Include source: 'Newton' | 'Manual' to differentiate inputs

issues.title: Animate Event Rendering on Load
issues.body:
Description: Add subtle entrance animations to event blocks when they appear on screen.

Tasks:

- [ ] Use framer-motion or Tailwind transition utilities

- [ ] Animate opacity and scale on event mount

- [ ] Delay slightly for a cascading effect

issues.title: Style Calendar Events as Cards
issues.body:
Description: Transform basic calendar events into visually appealing cards with shadows and rounded corners.

Tasks:

- [ ] Add rounded-lg, shadow-md, p-4 styling to event containers

- [ ] Use color coding for event types (assignment, exam, task)

- [ ] Include small icon or emoji prefix in each event card

issues.title: Modernize Sidebar Design with Icons
issues.body:
Description: Enhance the sidebar using iconography, spacing, and hover effects to improve navigation experience.

Tasks:

- [ ] Integrate lucide-react or heroicons for sidebar items

- [ ] Add hover: and active: Tailwind states

- [ ] Include a subtle animation when switching routes

issues.title: Upgrade Color Scheme and Theme Consistency
issues.body:
Description: Refine the app’s color palette to be modern and cohesive, using Tailwind’s custom theme options.

Tasks:

- [ ] Define 2–3 primary brand colors in tailwind.config.js

- [ ] Apply consistent background/text colors across header, sidebar, and event blocks

- [ ] Test contrast for light and dark modes

issues.title: Add Global Axios Interceptor for Token
issues.body:
Description: Attach the JWT to every outgoing request automatically to avoid repetitive code.

Tasks:

- [ ] Create axiosInstance.js with default headers

- [ ] Intercept requests and add Authorization: Bearer <token>

- [ ] Handle expired token or 401 responses globally

issues.title: Fetch Logged-In User Profile
issues.body:
Description: Call GET /api/auth/profile/:id to fetch the current user’s data and render on dashboard/profile page.

Tasks:

- [ ] Extract user ID from JWT or context

- [ ] Call the profile endpoint with token in headers

- [ ] Display user info on dashboard

- [ ] Handle loading/error states

issues.title: Implement Protected Routes
issues.body:
Description: Prevent unauthorized users from accessing certain pages like dashboard or profile.

Tasks:

- [ ] Create a PrivateRoute wrapper component

- [ ] Check for token before rendering

- [ ] Redirect to /login if not authenticated

issues.title: Create Auth Context to Manage User State
issues.body:
Description: Set up a global authentication context or hook to share user login state across components.

Tasks:

- [ ] Create AuthContext with user, token, and setUser logic

- [ ] Load token from localStorage on app start

- [ ] Provide AuthProvider to app root

issues.title: Connect Login Form to Backend API
issues.body:
Description: Integrate the login form with POST /api/auth/login to authenticate users and store the token.

Tasks:

- [ ] Submit login credentials via axios

- [ ] Save JWT in localStorage or cookie

- [ ] Redirect to dashboard on success

- [ ] Show error messages on invalid credentials

issues.title: Connect Signup Form to Backend API
issues.body:
Description: Wire up the signup form (Signup.jsx) to send data to the backend route POST /api/auth/signup.

Tasks:

- [ ] Create handleSignup() function using fetch() or axios

- [ ] Send formData as JSON to backend

- [ ] Show success or error messages using toast/snackbar

- [ ] Redirect to login page on success

issues.title: Track Last Login Timestamp
issues.body:
Description: Log when a user last logged in for analytics or dashboard features.

Tasks:

- [ ] Update lastLogin field on successful login

- [ ] Add field to user schema (optional timestamps: true already covers this)

issues.title: Forgot & Reset Password Flow
issues.body:
Description: Provide a way for users to reset passwords via email.

Tasks:

- [ ] Add /forgot-password → sends reset email

- [ ] Add /reset-password/:token route

- [ ] Token expires after 10–15 mins

issues.title: Implement Change Password Route
issues.body:
Description: Allow users to update their password via authenticated route.

Tasks:

- [ ] Add PUT /auth/change-password route
- [ ] Compare old password before updating
- [ ] Use validation + hash new password

issues.title: Add Soft Delete for Users
issues.body:
Description: Allow users to deactivate accounts instead of hard deletion.

Tasks:

- [ ] Update /DELETE /profile/:id to set isActive = false
- [ ] Prevent login if !user.isActive
- [ ] Optional: Add “reactivate” mechanism

issues.title: Add JWT Refresh Token Strategy
issues.body:
Description: Support long-lived logins using refresh tokens and short-lived access tokens.

Tasks:

- [ ] Issue access & refresh tokens on login
- [ ] Create /refresh-token endpoint
- [ ] Store refresh tokens securely (cookies or DB)

issues.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
issues.body:
Description: Use role field (user, admin) to limit access to sensitive routes.

Tasks:

- [ ] Add authorizeRoles(...roles) middleware
- [ ] Use it for admin-only routes
- [ ] Extend user schema or control panel for role assignment (optional)

issues.title: Add Email Verification Flow
issues.body:
Description: Send a verification email when users register, and only activate accounts once verified.

Tasks:

- [ ] Generate verification token and email link
- [ ] Create /api/auth/verify-email/:token route
- [ ] Update user’s isVerified flag on confirmation

issues.title: Protect Routes with JWT Middleware
issues.body:
Description: Add middleware to secure routes using JWTs, ensuring users can only access their own data.

Tasks:

- [ ] Create middleware/authMiddleware.js with token verification
- [ ] Decode token and attach user to req.user
- [ ] Apply middleware to /profile/:id routes and others

issues.title: Display Grades in Table + Chart
issues.body:
[ ] Create a styled table using grades[] data

[ ] Use Recharts or Chart.js to show performance graph

[ ] Allow filtering by subject or month

[ ] Handle loading and empty states


**Show users their grades in an interactive way with charts and tables**

issues.title: Create Endpoints to Store and Fetch Grades
issues.body:
Description: Build backend routes to handle saving and retrieving grades data.

Tasks:

[ ] POST /grades to store new grade records

[ ] GET /grades to fetch grades for logged-in user

[ ] Protect routes with JWT middleware

[ ] Validate input data on backend

issues.title: Set Up MongoDB Schema for Grades & Attendance
issues.body:
Create scalable Mongoose schemas for grade entries.

Ensure each grade or attendance record is linked to a specific user via userId.

Lay the foundation for future querying, charting, and user-specific dashboards.



[ ] Create Grade schema with fields: userId, subject, assignment, score, date

[ ] Optionally add Attendance schema if needed

[ ] Reference userId to relate grades to the logged-in user

[ ] Export models from models/Grade.js

issues.title: Design Grade Input Form UI
issues.body:
Description: Design a responsive form for students to input assignment grades. The form should collect key info like subject, score, assignment title, and date.

Tasks:

[ ] Create GradeForm.jsx component

[ ] Use reusable Input and Select components

[ ] Ensure mobile responsiveness

[ ] Add basic validation (e.g., required, score must be a number)

[ ] Structure folder as components/forms/

issues.title: Add /me Auth Route (JWT Verification)
issues.body:
Description: Create a protected /me route that requires JWT and returns the logged-in user's info.

Tasks:

[ ] Create middleware to verify JWT

[ ] Add /me route and use middleware

[ ] Return user data (email, name, etc.)

[ ] Handle invalid/missing token gracefull
